data.description: China attributes improvement in producer prices to domestic market dynamics and higher international oil prices.
Japan told the US Treasury it will provide FX updates when needed, as both sides commit to close cooperation, says Mimura.

data.title: China's economy relies on infrastructure as consumers cut spending due to 20% drop in housing prices. Government investing in new projects.
data.description: The significant drop in housing prices has resulted in decreased consumer wealth and spending willingness. However, the government is infusing funds into various projects such as new rail lines, to stimulate the economy.
China’s official says a rebound in PPI will have a positive effect on corporate profitability.
China says oil price swings have only a small effect on overall economic conditions, according to an official.
US military Southern Command says it carried out a lethal strike against a suspected terrorist-operated vessel.
US Southern Command reports fatalities among three narco-terrorists and confirms no injuries to US personnel.
US Southern Command reports intelligence showed the vessel was transiting known narco-trafficking corridors in the eastern Pacific.

data.title: BC.GAME launches exclusive online slot Ganesha Golden Wheel
data.description: In Belize City, Belize, BC.GAME has recently introduced the Ganesha Golden Wheel, a new online slot game. This exclusive release features Ganesha-inspired graphics and incorporates a Golden Wheel mechanic along with a dual-bonus setup. Players can now enjoy Ganesha Golden Wheel on the BC.GAME platform, alongside other popular games like Ganesha's Gold and more. This innovative slot offering adds a unique twist to the gaming experience, capturing the essence of Ganesha in a captivating virtual environment.
According to Semafor, Greer states the Trump administration is aiming for a pragmatic stance on China.
China reports a strong but hard-earned start to 2026 economic activity amid severe global pressures.
Japan’s finance minister says the timing and impact of spillover effects from the current situation cannot be forecast.
Japan’s finance minister says G7 participants saw no pressing need to coordinate action on private credit.
Nissan Motor’s ‘BB’ rating is affirmed by Fitch, with outlook kept negative.
Indonesia’s currency turns lower, trading at 17,140 per USD after erasing early gains.
Indonesia’s currency edges stronger to 17,125 per dollar at the open.

data.title: Fujifilm Introduces the Next Generation in Photo Printing Experiences: instax SPOT™ Photobooth and Print Station
data.description: Valhalla, N.Y. - FUJIFILM North America Corporation, Imaging Division, has unveiled its latest innovation in instant photography, the instax SPOT™ photobooth and print station. This cutting-edge, standalone photobooth and print station is set to revolutionize the way people capture and cherish memories. Built as a comprehensive solution for busy venues like movie theaters, museums, and amusement parks, the instax SPOT™ is a dynamic platform that transforms moments into physical keepsakes. Created to be a focal point of creativity, this premium photobooth/print station promises an unparalleled experience for users.

data.title: Toshiba Starts Sample Shipments of New “SmartMCD™” Series Product Integrating Microcontroller and Motor Driver
data.description: In Kawasaki, Japan, Toshiba has introduced a new product in their Smart Motor Control Driver SmartMCD™ series, offering a comprehensive solution for controlling automotive brushed DC motors. This latest offering is designed to streamline motor control processes and enhance efficiency in automotive applications, showcasing Toshiba's commitment to innovative technological advancements.
